sample_question: In what year was the creator of telescope observations born?
sample_context: Galileo Galilei was born in Pisa, Italy in 1564. Galileo Galilei created telescope observations in 1610. Meanwhile, Nikola Tesla was working on similar topics in Croatia.

trace.observation: Galileo Galilei was born in Pisa, Italy in 1564. Galileo Galilei created telescope observations in 1610. Meanwhile, Nikola Tesla was working on similar topics in Croatia.

Thought: I need to find out the birth year of Galileo Galilei, who created telescope observations.
Action: lookup(Galileo Galilei)

trace.thought: The birth year of Galileo Galilei is mentioned in the lookup result.
trace.raw_output:
Thought: The birth year of Galileo Galilei is mentioned in the lookup result.
Final Answer: 1564
